{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Authority
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Authority]] is the scope of power [[Sages]] and [[Monarchs]] have related to their [[Icons]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]'s authority can provide protection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
